title: Entity Move To Land Behavior
description: Allows the mob to move back onto land when in water.

goal_radius.title: Goal Radius
goal_radius.description:
Distance in blocks within the mob considers it has reached the goal. This is the "wiggle room" to stop the AI from bouncing back and forth trying to reach a specific spot.

Sample values:
• frog: 2

priority.title: Priority
priority.description:
As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

Sample values:
• frog: 6

search_count.title: Search Count
search_count.description:
The number of randomly selected blocks each tick that the mob will check within its search range and height for a valid block to move to. A value of 0 will have the mob check every block within range in one tick.

Sample values:
• frog: 80

search_height.title: Search Height
search_height.description:
Height in blocks the mob will look for land to move towards

Sample values:
• frog: 8

search_range.title: Search Range
search_range.description:
The distance in blocks it will look for land to move towards

Sample values:
• frog: 30

speed_multiplier.title: Speed Multiplier
speed_multiplier.description: Movement speed multiplier of the mob when using this goal.
